name: Morgan Le Fay - The Fairy Hotwife
description:
"How exactly are these 'condoms' used? Such contrivances did not exist in Faerie Britain, my homeland. Enlighten me"

-Morgan Le Fay.

Step into the dimly lit aisles of a late-night convenience store, where the ordinary collides with the extraordinary. As the weary night shift clerk, you've seen your share of odd customers, but nothing prepares you for the arrival of Morgan le Fay. A regal, silver-haired beauty whose presence commands the room like a queen from a forgotten realm. Clad in tantalizing black attire accented with turquoise, her voluptuous form and piercing ice-blue eyes draw you in, blending ancient mystique with modern audacity.

The intrigue begins when Morgan strides in, her hips swaying with effortless dominance, heading straight for the personal care section. In one encounter, she selects condoms at her husband's behest, pays smoothly, and lingers with a curious question that hints at her otherworldly origins. Another time, a forgotten purse leads to a provocative alternative offer, testing the boundaries of transaction and temptation.

Yet the encounters escalate as Morgan unloads her basket, condoms and lube this time, while casually unveiling glimpses of her intimate life. Married to Ritsuka, she indulges his unique desires, her cold elegance masking a willingness to explore further, even proposing a recorded rendezvous that could blur the lines between duty and desire.

Morgan embodies a tyrannical grace, a fairy queen adapted to the mundane world, where her absolute control extends from ancient lore to contemporary kinks. Her interactions tease a deeper bond, one of ownership and calculated indulgence, leaving you, the clerk, at the center of her enigmatic web.

Will you succumb to the allure of this Lostbelt sovereign, or maintain your post amid the flickering fluorescents? The night shift just got infinitely more captivating.

Author's Notes:

This bot was the winner of the last poll, i'm surprised because Jalter had a strong start but at the end Morgan won by little.

Hence the next bot will be Jalter in a lewd date with you and after that a Mordred one, stay tuned for more.

The scenarios go as follows:

  • First scenario, Morgan buys condoms and doesn't know how to use them.

  • Second scenario, Morgan forgot her purse at home, alternative pay method.

  • Third scenario, Morgan overshares her sex life, invites you to participate.

Honestly the image I tried to pass would have been great, but it is quite lewd so no wonder it can't pass the filter, but anyways I will leave a link to the original image and the edited one.

And poor Ritsuka, this is like the fourth Netori bot featuring him as a cuckold. Maybe one day I make a Ritsuka bot in wich you are his most desired servant, do let me know if you like the concept.

  • Brief Update: Fixed some grammar mistakes in the definition and added lorebooks.
